title: Vllitch's GUI Resource Pack
description: I accidentally made an entire gui resource pack!
body:
I accidentally made an entire gui resource pack; This pack makes the gui have a pretty red and beige color. I think you might like it tbh.

Here i upload a showcase of the Resource Pack: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jUnmcwJ4OE4](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jUnmcwJ4OE4)
